title: Cleanly Optimized
description: A Minecraft modpack focused on maximum performance, stability, and smooth gameplay!
body:
![Cleanly Optimized](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/112f6e535ba7459a1dbb60f2713070ce24fb4284_0.webp)

## Cleanly Optimized 
Cleanly Optimized is a **Performance** Focused modpack designed to make Minecraft run smoother and more stable while keeping the graphics.
It improves **FPS dramatically**, reduces lag, giving you the best perfomance overall. It delivers consistent FPS, reduces stutter and lag spikes, and enhances game stability.

Cleanly Optimized is a carefully curated collection of performance mods chosen for their stability and FPS gains. Each mod focuses on improving different parts of the game, such as rendering, chunk loading, and memory usage, working together to reduce stutter and lag spikes. This improves your gameplay by alot!



- Performance focused modpack built for smooth and stable gameplay
 
- Significantly higher and more consistent FPS

- Reduced stuttering, lag spikes, and frame drops

- Optimized CPU and memory usage for better efficiency

- Lightweight, clean, and fully vanilla-friendly

Any issues or other ideas feel free to join my discord server: [Click here](https://discord.gg/rvg9zESUeM)
